title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: SANDY HEALTH CENTER WIC OFFICE OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps pregnant people get connected to prenatal care and other resources in their communities. Services include health insurance navigation, such as OHP application assistance, prenatal care appointment scheduling, health education, and community referrals. Referrals can be provided for WIC, dental care, home visiting programs, and other prenatal support services. 39740 Pleasant Street Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Pregnant people Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (971) 930-9617 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 930-9617 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Friday 9am-12:30pm and 1pm-4pm Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SANDY HEALTH CENTER WIC OFFICE
